Operation 'get-car-details' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary uses awkward phrasing ('Get Extended information with'). Description lacks clarity about the required offerToken input parameter and doesn't explain what specific details are returned (pricing, fees, policies, vehicle specs). Improved version clarifies the input requirement, specifies the types of information returned using domain terminology from the API schemas (RateDetails, AdditionalFee, CancellationPolicy, VehicleDetails), and provides context for AI agents about when to use this operation in a booking workflow.

data.current_summary: Get Extended information with a single car offer
data.current_description: Extended information about the rates, charges, fees, and other terms associated with a single car offer.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific car rental offer using the offer token. Returns detailed information including vehicle specifications, pricing breakdown, rate details, additional fees, cancellation policies, and rental terms. Requires the offerToken parameter obtained from a prior car listings search. Use this operation after identifying a car offer of interest to get complete pricing and policy information before booking.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses awkward phrasing ('Get Extended information with'). Description lacks clarity about the required offerToken input parameter and doesn't explain what specific details are returned (pricing, fees, policies, vehicle specs). Improved version clarifies the input requirement, specifies the types of information returned using domain terminology from the API schemas (RateDetails, AdditionalFee, CancellationPolicy, VehicleDetails), and provides context for AI agents about when to use this operation in a booking workflow.
